notes: Salva discovery run (objective=find_companies, market=Taiwan, industry=fabless semiconductor/chip design) completed with retrieval_health=ok but qualified_count=0 — no entities returned for MediaTek specifically, so fell back to WebSearch. Two WebSearch queries used (within 3-query budget). Found conflicting HQ addresses across sources (Taipei address from one page vs Hsinchu Science Park from annual report/other pages) — MediaTek HQ is confirmed to be in Hsinchu, Taiwan; the Taipei address may be a registered/older filing address. IR email ir@mediatek.com and phone +886-3-567-0766 corroborated by search snippet from corp.mediatek.com IR news pages and annual report PDF.
